prioritizedRepositories.name: opencode
prioritizedRepositories.description: The open source coding agent.
recommendations: Pin GitHub Actions to immutable commit SHAs.
Replace workspace coupling with published internal package versions.
Commit lockfiles for all package manager roots and enforce frozen-lockfile installs.
Set non-root USER in Dockerfiles.
Apply baseline governance controls (SECURITY.md, Dependabot, CODEOWNERS, CI, security workflows).

prioritizedRepositories.name: secrets-portal
prioritizedRepositories.description: Zero-cost GitHub Secrets Management Portal - Web + Mobile + CLI
recommendations: Remove committed secrets/key material and rotate credentials immediately.

Commit lockfiles for all package manager roots and enforce frozen-lockfile installs.
Apply baseline governance controls (SECURITY.md, Dependabot, CODEOWNERS, CI, security workflows).
Add at least smoke/unit tests and enforce them in CI.
